title: billardiera longiflora var. ovalis
intro: Billardiera longiflora var. ovalis, also known as the Blueberry Lilly, is a flowering plant native to Australia. It is a member of the Pittosporaceae family and is prized for its vibrant blue fruits and ornamental value. The plant's roots, leaves, and berries have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of the Blueberry Lilly include its ability to support immune function and reduce inflammation, with herbal preparations often taking the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions.
